text: I find myself in a space devoted to research and development, where the glass walls and bright lighting evoke clarity and transparency. The environment feels orderly and purposeful, inviting reflection on progress and collaboration. The sight of the fire extinguisher and hose on the wall is a stark reminder of safety and unpredictability amid innovation. I feel a sense of curiosity mixed with a gentle vigilance, aware of both the drive to innovate and the ever-present need for caution.
